name: CONTRACT-BUG-48
title: templates/project-map-template.json shape doesn't validate against schemas/project-map.json.schema.json
description:
## Repro

contract/templates/project-map-template.json has shape `{schema_version, source_map: {}}` (or similar — pre-existing).
contract/schemas/project-map.json.schema.json (added in PR #202 / Task 1.2 / Inv 59) requires `{schema_version, features: {}}` with additionalProperties:false.

The template does NOT validate against the schema. Inv 22 requires that templates validate against their schemas (specifically: feature-json-template.json must validate against feature.json.schema.json), and the same principle should apply here.

## How it manifested

Caught by the Task 3.2 TDD subagent while implementing rabbit-feature-new plugin-mode scaffolding. The subagent noted (commit ede156dd, in its handoff notes): 'The contract templates/project-map-template.json is shaped differently from schemas/project-map.json.schema.json (template has source_map: {}, schema requires features: {}). I implemented to the schema since the task says "Schema-validate against the contract project-map.json.schema.json before writing." The template appears to be stale relative to the schema — out-of-scope to reconcile here.'

## Suggested fix

Rewrite project-map-template.json to match the schema:

```json
{
  "template_version": "1.0.0",
  "schema_version": "1.0.0",
  "features": {}
}
```

(Plus whatever top-level template_version field marker the template-marker convention requires.)

## Suggested test gap

Add an Inv stating that project-map-template.json MUST validate against project-map.json.schema.json. Add a test under contract/test/ that loads both and runs hand-rolled validation (matching the test-project-map-schema-shape.py pattern).

## Related

This is a sibling to Inv 22 ('feature-json-template.json MUST validate against feature.json.schema.json'). Worth promoting to a general invariant: every <X>-template.json MUST validate against its corresponding <X>.schema.json.

history.note: Fixed via project-map-template.json rewrite + template-schema validity regression test + new invariant
